mapper.update:
UPDATE t_coach_booking
booking_for_other = #{bookingForOther}, student_name = #{studentName}, student_phone = #{studentPhone}, person_count = #{personCount}, course_id = #{courseId}, course_name = #{courseName}, course_type = #{courseType}, booking_date = #{bookingDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, hours = #{hours}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, status = #{status}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, rating = #{rating}, comment = #{comment}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
